title: BA City: Argentina’s Crypto Hub | Regulation Day Devconnect Edition
description:
This panel features Hernán Lombardi (BA City Minister of Economic Development) and Augusto Ardiles (BA City Undersecretary of Investment), discussing Buenos Aires’ role as a strategic hub for crypto and digital innovation. The conversation addresses public policy initiatives, investment attraction, and how the city is positioning itself to support builders, startups, and emerging technologies.

This discussion was part of Regulation Day – Devconnect Edition, held during Devconnect 2025 in Buenos Aires. Regulation Day convened policymakers, regulators, founders, builders, and industry leaders to foster open dialogue around regulation, innovation, and the future of decentralized technologies.

Crecimiento is a global movement working to position Argentina as a leading hub for crypto and emerging technologies. Through community-driven programs, education, and dialogue between the public and private sectors, Crecimiento supports builders, founders, and institutions shaping the future of the ecosystem.
